assertions.title: Users list loads with real users

steps.observed: DataTable renders 8-9 rows with display name, email, role badges (Admin, Sales, Accounting, etc.), and Active status badges
GET /api/v1/admin/users fired on page load (confirmed via network requests)
No console errors on page load

assertions.title: Create user E2E

steps.observed: Modal opens with Email, Display Name, Role checkboxes, Company dropdown

steps.action: Fill form with val-e2e-{timestamp}@test.com, 'E2E Test User', Sales role, Mock Training Co
steps.observed: Fields populated correctly
POST /api/v1/admin/users returns 400 — backend rejects payload with 'Unrecognized field companyId'

assertions.issues: Frontend sends companyId in CreateUserRequest payload but backend's CreateUserRequest DTO only accepts email, displayName, roles. The companyId field causes a 400 'Unrecognized field' error. Create user via curl without companyId works fine and returns 200/201.

steps.action: Open Create User modal and submit empty form
steps.observed: Errors shown: 'Email is required', 'Display name is required', 'Please select at least one role.', 'Please select a company.'
'Enter a valid email address' shown below email field
No POST request captured — validation prevents submission

assertions.title: Edit user persists changes

steps.action: Open actions dropdown → Edit on test user (ID 18)
steps.expected: Edit modal opens with pre-populated data
steps.observed: Edit modal opens with email, display name, role (Sales checked), company (Mock Training Co selected)

steps.action: Change display name to 'E2E Test User Edited'
steps.observed: Field updated
PUT /api/v1/admin/users/18 returns 400 — backend rejects payload with 'Unrecognized field companyId'
curl PUT without companyId returns 200, name updated to 'E2E Test User Edited'
'E2E Test User Edited' visible in user list

assertions.issues: Same as VAL-USERS-002: Frontend sends companyId in UpdateUserRequest payload but backend only accepts displayName and roles. The edit form opens correctly, pre-populates data, and the UI flow works up to the API call.

steps.action: Open actions dropdown for test user → click Suspend
steps.observed: ConfirmDialog with 'Cancel' and 'Suspend' buttons appears
PATCH /api/v1/admin/users/18/suspend sent successfully, status badge changes to 'Suspended' (red)

steps.action: Open actions dropdown for suspended user → click Unsuspend
steps.observed: ConfirmDialog with 'Cancel' and 'Unsuspend' buttons appears
PATCH /api/v1/admin/users/18/unsuspend sent successfully, status badge reverts to 'Active' (green)

steps.action: Open actions dropdown → click 'Force reset password'
steps.observed: ConfirmDialog with 'Cancel' and 'Send reset link' buttons appears
POST /api/v1/admin/users/18/force-reset-password sent successfully. Toast appears: 'Password reset sent — A reset link has been sent to val-e2e-1774941475@test.com.'

steps.action: Open actions dropdown for test user → click Delete
steps.expected: Danger confirmation dialog with 'This cannot be undone'
steps.observed: ConfirmDialog shows 'Are you sure you want to permanently delete E2E Test User Edited? This cannot be undone.' with red 'Delete' button

steps.expected: DELETE /api/v1/admin/users/18 returns 204, user disappears from list
steps.observed: DELETE /api/v1/admin/users/18 sent successfully. User list refreshes, test user removed. Row count drops from 9 to 8.

steps.action: Click a user row (E2E Test User Edited)
steps.observed: Modal opens with avatar (initials 'ET'), display name, email, status, role, company, MFA status, created date

steps.expected: Shows avatar, display name, email, status, roles, company, MFA status, created date
steps.observed: All fields present: avatar 'ET', name 'E2E Test User Edited', email 'val-e2e-1774941475@test.com', Status 'Active', Role 'Sales', Company 'MOCK', MFA 'Disabled', created date visible
Modal closes on clicking Close button

assertions.title: User actions dropdown shows correct items

steps.action: Open dropdown for active non-MFA user (E2E Test User)
steps.expected: View, Edit, Suspend, Force reset, Delete (no Disable MFA)
steps.observed: View, Edit, Suspend, Force reset password, Delete shown. No 'Disable MFA' item.

steps.action: Open dropdown for active MFA-enabled user (Validation MFA Admin)
steps.expected: View, Edit, Suspend, Force reset, Disable MFA, Delete (red)
steps.observed: View, Edit, Suspend, Force reset password, Disable MFA, Delete shown
When test user was suspended, dropdown showed 'Unsuspend' instead of 'Suspend'

steps.expected: Table filters to show only matching users
steps.observed: Table filters to 1 row showing 'Validation MFA Admin'
No API requests captured — client-side filtering
All 9 rows restored

steps.expected: Danger confirmation dialog with 'This cannot be undone'
steps.observed: ConfirmDialog appears: 'Are you sure you want to permanently delete E2E Test User Edited? This cannot be undone.' with red Delete button
Dialog dismissed, no DELETE request captured
ConfirmDialog appears with 'Cancel' and 'Suspend' buttons
Dialog dismissed, no PATCH request captured
ConfirmDialog appears with 'Cancel' and 'Disable MFA' buttons

steps.action: Click Cancel on Disable MFA dialog
steps.observed: Dialog dismissed, no PATCH request captured

steps.action: Click 'Force reset password' on test user
steps.observed: ConfirmDialog appears with 'Cancel' and 'Send reset link' buttons

evidence.network: no requests on cancel for Delete, Suspend, Disable MFA

steps.observed: Mobile card layout activated — 9 cards rendered with custom mobileCardRenderer (confirmed via DOM eval)

steps.expected: Cards show avatar, name, email, status badge, role badges, actions dropdown
steps.observed: Cards contain: avatar (initials), display name, email, Active/Suspended status badge, role badges, MFA status, action button
scrollWidth (375) === clientWidth (375) — no horizontal overflow

frictions.description: Dropdown menu items (View, Edit, Suspend, etc.) could not be clicked via agent-browser click @ref — timed out consistently. Had to use JS eval to find and click buttons by text content.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser eval 'document.querySelectorAll("button").forEach(b => { if (b.textContent.trim() === "Button Text") b.click(); })' as workaround

frictions.description: Network request log shows duplicate entries — each request appears 6-17 times. This is likely due to React StrictMode double-rendering in dev mode and the Vite HMR connection.
frictions.resolution: Used presence/absence of requests rather than exact count for verification

summary: Tested 12 assertions: 10 passed, 2 failed. VAL-USERS-002 (Create user) and VAL-USERS-004 (Edit user) fail because the frontend sends a companyId field in the API payload that the backend's DTO does not accept, resulting in a 400 error. The underlying API works correctly when called without companyId (verified via curl). All other assertions (list load, form validation, suspend/unsuspend, force reset, delete, detail modal, action dropdown, search/filter, confirmation dialogs, mobile layout) pass successfully.
